---
title: ""
listing:
  contents: 
    - "posts/*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date asc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: false
  image-align: left
  image-height: "8em"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

::: {style="text-align: center;"}
[![](teaching_finance_with_ai_logo.png){width="150px"}](https://blog.finance-with-ai.org)
:::

Follow on [Substack](https://kerryback.substack.com)
<br><br><br>
